title: pittosporum pickeringii
intro: Pittosporum pickeringii, also known as the Mexican laurel or Mexican plum, is a plant species native to Mexico and the southwestern United States. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, and has been used to treat various health issues such as wounds, fever, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Pittosporum pickeringii include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate coughs, and support the immune system. The plant is often prepared as a tea or tincture, with herbal preparations typically involving the bark, leaves, or roots being steeped in hot water or mixed with a solvent to create a medicinal extract.
